title: Stepan Razin
writer: Aleksei Chapygin, Ivan Pravov, Olga Preobrazhenskaya
actors: Andrei Abrikosov, Vladimir Gardin, Sergey Petrov
plot: Don Cossack Stepan Razin swore revenge on the boyars for his tortured friends. Leading the rebel peasants, he becomes the leader of the whole army. From all over the land of the Russian, humiliated and offended flock to him. Tsar ...
